name: mtg-skills
description: Magic: The Gathering skills for Claude Code: build and upgrade Commander/EDH decks (tuned, priced 100-card lists) and MTG Arena Standard decks (60-card meta decks costed in wildcards, built from your collection), find cards, star-rate decks, and export your MTG Arena collection to CSV. Backed by a local Scryfall card database for fast, rate-limit-friendly card data, with optional git-backed syncing of your decks and collection across machines.
